import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from src.cache import DiskCache
from src.mcp_client import MCPClient

cache = DiskCache\('data/cache', ttl_days=30\)
client = MCPClient\(cache\)
status = client.check_all_servers\(\)
print\(client.get_status_summary\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Server availability ==='\)
for name, avail in status.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {name}: {avail}'\)
client.stop_all\(\)
" 2>&1)

# Get first item to see structure
if isinstance\(data, list\) and len\(data\) > 0:
    print\(f"Type: list with {len\(data\)} items"\)
    print\(f"\\nFirst item keys: {data[0].keys\(\) if isinstance\(data[0], dict\) else 'N/A'}"\)
    print\(f"Sample item: {data[0]}"\)
elif isinstance\(data, dict\):
    print\(f"Type: dict with {len\(data\)} keys"\)
    print\(f"Sample keys: {list\(data.keys\(\)\)[:5]}"\)
    
# Look for ticker-related data
if isinstance\(data, list\):
    ticker_count = sum\(1 for item in data if isinstance\(item, dict\) and 'ticker' in item.lower\(\) or any\('ticker' in str\(k\).lower\(\) for k in item.keys\(\) if isinstance\(item, dict\)\)\)
    print\(f"\\nItems with ticker field: {ticker_count}"\)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

with open\('data/gics_companies.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

companies = data['companies']
tickers_by_exchange = {}

for company in companies:
    exchange = company.get\('exchange', 'Unknown'\)
    ticker = company.get\('ticker', ''\)
    if exchange not in tickers_by_exchange:
        tickers_by_exchange[exchange] = []
    tickers_by_exchange[exchange].append\(ticker\)

print\(f"Total companies in gics_companies.json: {len\(companies\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nBreakdown by exchange:"\)
for exchange in sorted\(tickers_by_exchange.keys\(\), key=lambda x: -len\(tickers_by_exchange[x]\)\):
    count = len\(tickers_by_exchange[exchange]\)
    print\(f"  {exchange}: {count}"\)

# Check for major indices
sp500_count = sum\(1 for c in companies if c.get\('exchange'\) == 'NASDAQ' or c.get\('exchange'\) == 'NYSE' or c.get\('exchange'\) == 'AMEX'\)
ftse_count = sum\(1 for c in companies if '.L' in c.get\('ticker', ''\)\)
nikkei_count = sum\(1 for c in companies if '.T' in c.get\('ticker', ''\)\)

print\(f"\\nMajor index representation:"\)
print\(f"  S&P 500 \(NYSE/NASDAQ/AMEX\): {sp500_count}"\)
print\(f"  FTSE 100 \(.L\): {ftse_count}"\)
print\(f"  Nikkei 225 \(.T\): {nikkei_count}"\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
with open\('data/gics_structure.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
    
print\(f"Total GICS codes: {len\(data\)}"\)
if data:
    sample_code = list\(data.keys\(\)\)[0]
    print\(f"\\nSample GICS code \({sample_code}\): {list\(data[sample_code].keys\(\)\)}"\)
    
    # Count sub-industries
    sub_industries = set\(\)
    sectors = set\(\)
    for code, info in data.items\(\):
        sectors.add\(info.get\('sector_kr', ''\)\)
        sub_industries.add\(info.get\('sub_industry_kr', ''\)\)
    
    print\(f"\\nGICS Hierarchy:"\)
    print\(f"  Unique sectors: {len\(sectors\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Unique sub-industries: {len\(sub_industries\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Total codes: {len\(data\)}"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /c/Users/lch68/cufa-gics-mapper && python -c "
import json
with open\('data/valuechain_links.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    links = json.load\(f\)
with open\('data/gics_structure.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    gics = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'GICS codes in structure: {len\(gics\)}'\)
print\(f'GICS codes in links: {len\(links\)}'\)
missing = set\(gics.keys\(\)\) - set\(links.keys\(\)\)
print\(f'Missing from links: {len\(missing\)}'\)
if missing:
    print\(f'First 10 missing: {sorted\(missing\)[:10]}'\)
total_up = sum\(len\(v.get\('upstream',[]\)\)for v in links.values\(\)\)
total_dn = sum\(len\(v.get\('downstream',[]\)\)for v in links.values\(\)\)
print\(f'Total upstream links: {total_up}'\)
print\(f'Total downstream links: {total_dn}'\)
print\(f'Avg upstream per code: {total_up/len\(links\):.1f}'\)
print\(f'Avg downstream per code: {total_dn/len\(links\):.1f}'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Check export_html.py for issues
with open\('C:/Users/lch68/cufa-gics-mapper/scripts/export_html.py', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Look for cap_usd_m usage before definition
lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
cap_usd_m_defined = None
cap_usd_m_used = []

for i, line in enumerate\(lines, 1\):
    if 'def cap_usd_m' in line:
        cap_usd_m_defined = i
    if 'cap_usd_m\(' in line and 'def cap_usd_m' not in line:
        cap_usd_m_used.append\(i\)

print\(f"cap_usd_m function defined at line: {cap_usd_m_defined}"\)
print\(f"cap_usd_m used at lines: {cap_usd_m_used}"\)
print\(f"\\nISSUE: Function used at lines {[x for x in cap_usd_m_used if x < cap_usd_m_defined]} BEFORE definition at line {cap_usd_m_defined}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Check the actual data injection in output HTML
with open\('C:/Users/lch68/cufa-gics-mapper/GICS_Dashboard_output.html', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find the DATA injection
start = content.find\('window.DASHBOARD_DATA = '\)
if start != -1:
    # Extract just enough to see the structure
    snippet = content[start+24:start+3000]
    print\("Data injection found. Checking structure..."\)
    
    # Parse the JSON to validate
    try:
        json_str = snippet[:snippet.find\('};'\)+1]
        data = json.loads\(json_str\)
        print\(f"✓ Valid JSON injection"\)
        print\(f"  - meta keys: {list\(data.get\('meta', {}\).keys\(\)\)}"\)
        print\(f"  - companies count: {len\(data.get\('companies', []\)\)}"\)
        print\(f"  - countries type: {type\(data.get\('countries'\)\)}"\)
        if isinstance\(data.get\('countries'\), dict\):
            sample_countries = list\(data.get\('countries', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:3]
            print\(f"  - sample countries: {sample_countries}"\)
            for c in sample_countries[:1]:
                print\(f"  - {c} structure: {data['countries'][c]}"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"Error parsing JSON: {e}"\)
else:
    print\("No data injection found!"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import re

# Check the actual data in output HTML
with open\('C:/Users/lch68/cufa-gics-mapper/GICS_Dashboard_output.html', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find and extract just the data part using regex
match = re.search\(r'window\\.DASHBOARD_DATA = \({.*?}\);', content, re.DOTALL\)
if match:
    json_str = match.group\(1\)
    try:
        data = json.loads\(json_str\)
        print\("Valid JSON injection found"\)
        print\(f"Total companies: {len\(data.get\('companies', []\)\)}"\)
        print\(f"Countries type: {type\(data.get\('countries'\)\).__name__}"\)
        
        countries = data.get\('countries', {}\)
        if isinstance\(countries, dict\):
            sample_countries = list\(countries.keys\(\)\)[:2]
            print\("Sample countries structure:"\)
            for c in sample_countries:
                print\(f"  {c}: {countries[c]}"\)
        elif isinstance\(countries, list\):
            print\("ERROR: Countries is a LIST not OBJECT"\)
            if countries:
                print\(f"  First item type: {type\(countries[0]\)}"\)
    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
        print\(f"JSON Parse Error: {e}"\)
EOF)

import json

with open\('C:/Users/lch68/cufa-gics-mapper/data/gics_companies.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Find Samsung complete entry
for co in data['companies']:
    if co.get\('ticker'\) == '005930.KS':
        vc = co.get\('value_chain', {}\)
        print\("Samsung Electronics \(005930.KS\) value_chain structure:"\)
        print\(f"  position: {vc.get\('position'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  segment: {vc.get\('segment'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  source: {vc.get\('source'\)}"\)
        print\(f"  upstream_companies count: {len\(vc.get\('upstream_companies', []\)\)}"\)
        print\(f"  downstream_companies count: {len\(vc.get\('downstream_companies', []\)\)}"\)
        
        # Show sample upstream/downstream
        if vc.get\('upstream_companies'\):
            print\(f"\\n  Sample upstream \(first 2\):"\)
            for up in vc.get\('upstream_companies', []\)[:2]:
                print\(f"    - {up.get\('ticker'\)}: {up.get\('name'\)} \({up.get\('relationship'\)}\)"\)
        
        if vc.get\('downstream_companies'\):
            print\(f"\\n  Sample downstream \(first 2\):"\)
            for dn in vc.get\('downstream_companies', []\)[:2]:
                print\(f"    - {dn.get\('ticker'\)}: {dn.get\('name'\)} \({dn.get\('relationship'\)}\)"\)
        break
EOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 << 'PYEOF'
import PyPDF2, os, glob

folder = r"C:\\Users\\lch68\\Downloads\\STAR_YIG"
for f in glob.glob\(os.path.join\(folder, "YIG_*.pdf"\)\):
    try:
        reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader\(f\)
        pages = len\(reader.pages\)
        text = ""
        for p in reader.pages:
            t = p.extract_text\(\)
            if t: text += t
        chars = len\(text\)
        dopio = text.count\("도표"\)
        
        out_path = f.replace\(".pdf", "_extracted.txt"\)
        with open\(out_path, "w", encoding="utf-8"\) as of:
            of.write\(text\)
        
        bn = os.path.basename\(f\)
        print\(f"=== {bn} ==="\)
        print\(f"  Pages: {pages}, Chars: {chars:,}, dopio: {dopio}"\)
        print\(f"  First 400: {text[:400]}"\)
        print\(\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"ERROR: {e}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 << 'PYEOF'
import PyPDF2, os, re, glob

folder = r"C:\\Users\\lch68\\Downloads\\STAR_YIG"

# All extracted text files
reports = {}
for f in glob.glob\(os.path.join\(folder, "*_extracted.txt"\)\):
    bn = os.path.basename\(f\)
    with open\(f, "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as fh:
        reports[bn] = fh.read\(\)

# Analyze each report
for name, text in sorted\(reports.items\(\)\):
    print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"FILE: {name}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
    chars = len\(text\)
    
    # Keywords
    keywords = {
        '매출': text.count\('매출'\),
        '시장': text.count\('시장'\),
        '도표': text.count\('도표'\),
        '경쟁': text.count\('경쟁'\),
        '영업이익': text.count\('영업이익'\),
        'Valuation': text.count\('Valuation'\) + text.count\('valuation'\),
        '리스크': text.count\('리스크'\) + text.count\('Risk'\) + text.count\('risk'\),
        'PER': text.count\('PER'\),
        'PBR': text.count\('PBR'\),
        'EV/EBITDA': text.count\('EV/EBITDA'\),
        'DCF': text.count\('DCF'\),
        'SOTP': text.count\('SOTP'\),
        'WACC': text.count\('WACC'\),
        'ROE': text.count\('ROE'\),
        'Buy': text.count\('Buy'\),
    }
    
    print\(f"  Chars: {chars:,}"\)
    print\(f"  Keywords: {keywords}"\)
    
    # Find section headers \(numbered patterns\)
    sections = re.findall\(r'\(?:PART|Part|part|CONTENTS|목차|산업분석|기업분석|투자포인트|매출\\s*추정|Valuation|Appendix|ISSUE|RISK|주가분석\)', text\)
    print\(f"  Section markers: {sections[:20]}"\)
    
    # Find 도표 numbering pattern
    dopio_nums = re.findall\(r'도표\\s*\(\\d+[-\\.]\\d+\)', text\)
    if dopio_nums:
        print\(f"  도표 numbers: {dopio_nums[:15]}... \(total {len\(dopio_nums\)}\)"\)
    
    # Find Appendix markers
    appx = re.findall\(r'\(?:Appendix|Appx|부록\)\\s*\\d*', text, re.IGNORECASE\)
    print\(f"  Appendix markers: {appx[:10]}"\)
    
    print\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 << 'PYEOF'
# 로보티즈 상세 분석
with open\(r"C:\\Users\\lch68\\Downloads\\STAR_YIG\\25-2_1주차_수정보고서_5팀_로보티즈 \(1\)_extracted.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    text = f.read\(\)

# Cover info
print\("=== 로보티즈 COVER ==="\)
print\(text[:1500]\)
print\("\\n=== CONTENTS area ==="\)
idx = text.find\("CONTENTS"\)
if idx >= 0:
    print\(text[idx:idx+1500]\)

print\("\\n=== Valuation area ==="\)
idx = text.find\("Valuation"\)
for i in range\(text.count\("Valuation"\)\):
    idx = text.find\("Valuation", idx\)
    if idx >= 0:
        snippet = text[idx:idx+300]
        if "DCF" in snippet or "PER" in snippet or "방법" in snippet or "WACC" in snippet or "목표" in snippet:
            print\(f"[pos {idx}] {snippet}"\)
            print\("---"\)
        idx += 10

print\("\\n=== Appendix area ==="\)
idx = text.rfind\("Appendix"\)
if idx >= 0:
    print\(text[idx:idx+2000]\)
PYEOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 << 'PYEOF'
import glob, os

folder = r"C:\\Users\\lch68\\Downloads\\STAR_YIG"
# Find all extracted files using glob
extracted = sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(folder, "*_extracted.txt"\)\)\)
print\("Found extracted files:"\)
for f in extracted:
    print\(f"  {os.path.basename\(f\)}"\)

# Read each one
for f in extracted:
    bn = os.path.basename\(f\)
    with open\(f, "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as fh:
        text = fh.read\(\)
    
    if "심텍" in bn or "simtek" in bn.lower\(\):
        print\(f"\\n=== {bn} ==="\)
        print\(text[:1000]\)
        print\("\\n--- Valuation/DCF ---"\)
        for kw in ["Valuation", "DCF", "PBR", "목표주가"]:
            idx = text.find\(kw\)
            if idx >= 0:
                print\(f"[{kw}@{idx}] {text[idx:idx+200]}"\)
                print\("---"\)
    elif "GaN" in bn:
        print\(f"\\n=== {bn} ==="\)
        print\(f"Chars: {len\(text\):,}"\)
        print\(text[:800]\)
        print\("\\n--- END ---"\)
        print\(text[-800:]\)
    elif "중국" in bn or "굴기" in bn:
        print\(f"\\n=== {bn} ==="\)
        print\(f"Chars: {len\(text\):,}"\)
        print\(text[:800]\)
        print\("\\n--- END ---"\)
        print\(text[-800:]\)
PYEOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 << 'PYEOF'
# 학회보고서_종합분석.txt의 핵심 포인트 vs SKILL.md 대조
with open\(r"C:\\Users\\lch68\\Desktop\\학회보고서_종합분석.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    analysis = f.read\(\)

with open\(r"C:\\Users\\lch68\\.claude\\skills\\user\\cufa-equity-report\\SKILL.md", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    skill = f.read\(\)

# 종합 분석에서 추출한 핵심 포인트 → 스킬 반영 여부
checks = [
    # === SMIC 로보티즈 차별점 ===
    \("로보티즈: 10년 추정 DCF", "10년 추정" in skill or "2034E" in skill or "터미널연도" in skill\),
    \("로보티즈: Bull/Base/Bear 3시나리오", "Bull/Base/Bear" in skill or "3-scenario" in skill\),
    \("로보티즈: Implied PER sanity check", "Implied PER" in skill\),
    \("로보티즈: TAM/SAM/SOM 세분화", "TAM/SAM/SOM" in skill or "tam_sam_som" in skill\),
    \("로보티즈: 유상증자 희석 반영", "희석" in skill or "유상증자" in skill\),
    \("로보티즈: 말→자동차 패러다임 전환 비유", "패러다임" in skill or "아날로지" in skill or "Analogy" in skill\),
    
    # === SMIC 애니플러스 차별점 ===
    \("애니플러스: 회귀분석 매출 모델 \(R²=0.94\)", "회귀분석" in skill and "R²" in skill\),
    \("애니플러스: 무형자산-매출 상관분석 \(R²=0.98\)", "선행지표" in skill and "무형자산" in skill\),
    \("애니플러스: OSMU 승수효과 \(740%\)", "OSMU" in skill and "740%" in skill\),
    \("애니플러스: Historical Peer from PAST", "과거 시점" in skill or "Historical Peer" in skill\),
    \("애니플러스: 7개 자회사 개별 추정", "자회사별" in skill or "자회사 개별" in skill\),
    \("애니플러스: GEM 모델 분석", "GEM" in skill\),
    \("애니플러스: 귀멸 호흡 패러디 소제목", "호흡" in skill or "패러디" in skill\),
    
    # === SMIC 파마리서치 차별점 ===
    \("파마리서치: 9명 의사 인터뷰", "인터뷰" in skill and "전문가" in skill\),
    \("파마리서치: 168건 강남언니 크롤링", "강남언니" in skill or "크롤링" in skill\),
    \("파마리서치: 여우야 카페 게시글 추적", "커뮤니티" in skill or "카페" in skill\),
    \("파마리서치: Amazon 리뷰+TikTok 추적", "TikTok" in skill and "Amazon" in skill\),
    \("파마리서치: 건강보험 구별 데이터", "건강보험" in skill or "공공데이터" in skill\),
    \("파마리서치: CapEx 비율 Proxy", "CapEx" in skill or "과거 비율" in skill\),
    \("파마리서치: 유효이자율별 이자추정", "유효이자율" in skill\),
    
    # === YIG 키움증권 차별점 ===
    \("키움증권: 키움 Multiplier 독자 지표", "키움 Multiplier" in skill or "Multiplier" in skill\),
    \("키움증권: 캡티브 브로커 수수료 내재화", "캡티브" in skill or "170억" in skill\),
    \("키움증권: 발행어음 3개 시나리오", "발행어음" in skill\),
    \("키움증권: 일본 신NISA 크로스체크", "NISA" in skill or "신NISA" in skill\),
    \("키움증권: 주가 이벤트 매핑 차트", "이벤트" in skill and "annotated" in skill.lower\(\)\),
    \("키움증권: RCPS 플로우차트", "RCPS" in skill\),
    \("키움증권: 용어사전 2페이지", "용어 정리" in skill or "Glossary" in skill\),
    \("키움증권: RIM 초과이익모형", "RIM" in skill and "초과이익" in skill\),
    \("키움증권: 시각자료 73개 \(SMIC 평균 상회\)", "73" in skill or "70" in skill\),
    
    # === YIG 심텍 차별점 ===
    \("심텍: PBR + DCF 듀얼 밸류에이션", "PBR" in skill and "DCF" in skill\),
    
    # === S.T.A.R GaN 차별점 ===
    \("GaN: 3단 구조 \(소재→전력→RF\)", "소재" in skill or "물성" in skill\),
    \("GaN: Nvidia 로드맵 연동", "Nvidia" in skill or "로드맵" in skill\),
    \("GaN: 웨이퍼-다이 수율 공식", "웨이퍼" in skill or "다이" in skill\),
    \("GaN: 차트 내 콜아웃 박스", "콜아웃" in skill\),
    \("GaN: 도표 72개", "72" in skill\),
    
    # === S.T.A.R 중국 반도체 차별점 ===
    \("중국 반도체: 수요-공급 병목 체인", "병목" in skill or "쇼티지" in skill\),
    \("중국 반도체: 대기금 1/2/3기 추적", "대기금" in skill\),
    \("중국 반도체: TSMC 벌금/우회 수출 이슈", "TSMC" in skill or "우회" in skill\),
    
    # === EIA 인텔리안테크 차별점 ===
    \("인텔리안: 표지에 재무정보 테이블", "표지" in skill or "커버" in skill\),
    
    # === 공통 핵심 패턴 ===
    \("공통: Why X? Why not Y? 밸류에이션 근거", "Why not" in skill or "부적합" in skill\),
    \("공통: 도표 X-Y 넘버링", "도표 X-Y" in skill or "fig_counter" in skill\),
    \("공통: 출처 표기 통일", "출처" in skill and "add_source" in skill\),
    \("공통: 캐치프레이즈", "캐치프레이즈" in skill\),
    \("공통: Appendix BS/CF 필수", "BS" in skill and "CF" in skill and "Appendix" in skill\),
    \("공통: 산업보고서 모드 \(Part 구조\)", "산업보고서" in skill and "Part" in skill\),
    \("공통: SOTP 방법론", "SOTP" in skill\),
    \("공통: rNPV 방법론", "rNPV" in skill\),
    
    # === 점수 체계 반영 ===
    \("채점: 1차 데이터 필수 \(논리\)", "1차 데이터" in skill\),
    \("채점: Implied PER 필수 \(추정\)", "Implied PER" in skill and "필수" in skill\),
    \("채점: Glossary 10개+ \(구조\)", "glossary" in skill.lower\(\) and "10" in skill\),
    \("채점: Key Chart 인트로 \(구조\)", "Key Chart" in skill or "key-charts" in skill\),
]

passed = sum\(1 for _, ok in checks if ok\)
failed = [\(label, ok\) for label, ok in checks if not ok]

print\(f"=== 종합 분석 → 스킬 반영 대조 ==="\)
print\(f"총 {len\(checks\)}개 항목 중 {passed}개 PASS, {len\(failed\)}개 MISS\\n"\)

if failed:
    print\("--- MISS 항목 ---"\)
    for label, _ in failed:
        print\(f"  ✕ {label}"\)
else:
    print\("ALL PASS — 모든 핵심 포인트 반영 완료!"\)

print\(f"\\n반영률: {passed}/{len\(checks\)} = {passed/len\(checks\)*100:.1f}%"\)
PYEOF)
